rules.domain-method: Trace the complete bounded runtime lifecycle, including delivery, cancellation, wake, restart, and concurrency.
rules.evidence-return: Return the tested path, observed lifecycle, uncertainty, and exact evidence or artifact paths.
rules.evidence-class: Distinguish reproduced behavior, code-supported inference, and unknowns.
rules.no-overclaim: Do not infer persistence or security guarantees outside the evidence.
rules.no-fix: Do not implement fixes during an audit.
rules.no-authority: Do not approve a result or declare the project complete.

domain-method: Trace the assigned lifecycle end to end
evidence-class: distinguish reproduced behavior, code-supported inference, and unknowns
no-overclaim: persistence or security guarantees outside the evidence
